title: General food safety tips - Canada.ca
content:
## General food safety tips
Protect your family with tips for handling, storing, cooking, barbecuing and reheating food. Also find facts on pesticides and food safety, labels and packaging, and allergies.

## Services and information
Learn how to choose, handle and prepare food safely to protect yourself and others from food poisoning.

### Safe internal cooking temperatures
Prevent food poisoning by using a digital thermometer to check cooked meat, poultry and seafood for a safe internal temperature.

### Safely defrosting foods
Learn how to safely defrost your meat, poultry, fish and seafood to avoid food poisoning.

### Interactive tool on food safety
Use this interactive tool to explore safe food handling tips for the grocery store and at home.
Learn about proper food storage to prevent illness from food poisoning.

### Food safety tips for barbecuing
Know the health risks of handling raw meat, poultry and seafood when using a barbecue, especially in the warmer months. Also get tips on proper storage, thawing and cooking.
Use proper canning and bottling practices when preparing food for later use to prevent food poisoning.

### Food safety tips for leftovers
Keep your family safe from food poisoning by knowing how to properly handle, store and reheat food for leftovers.

### Food safety tips for microwave ovens
Find tips on properly thawing and cooking food in your microwave oven, including using the proper containers.
Learn about produce contamination. Also find tips to help you shop for, clean and store fresh fruits and vegetables properly.

### Safety tips for reuseable grocery bags and bins
Know the risks of food poisoning when using reusable grocery bags and bins. Avoid cross-contamination by following these food safety practices.
Reduce the risk of cooking fires in the home by following these safety tips for using stovetops, ovens and deep fryers. Also find out what to do in case of a grease or oil fire.

### How to read food date labels and packaging
Learn how to read the best-before and expiration date information on prepackaged food products to help prevent food poisoning.

### Pesticides and food safety
Find out how pesticides keep food crops safe. Also learn about safety regulations that limit pesticide residue.

### Safe handling of flour
Learn how to cook and handle flour safely to avoid the risk of food poisoning

### Safe food handling tips
Information for consumers and for industry and professionals

### COVID-19 and food safety
Safe food practices, safe food shopping, home food delivery, online food shopping.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
